items.name: Red Electric Lightning Skateboard
items.description:
Only 50 copies available! Originally available here: https://www.roblox.com/games/14292095750 

Join my UGC group for updates on new accessories! https://www.roblox.com/groups/15995047

This awesome skate deck features black / red electric lightning & fits with cool cyberpunk emo / scene / goth / y2k / punk rock / grunge skater outfits. Whether you're a star gamer skateboarder, or like skateboarding at the skatepark, bring this cool board along in the epic cyber metaverse. 

If you're looking for more colors of the rainbow, check out my entire collection of red / orange / yellow / green / blue / grey / purple / white / and pink skateboards here:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=skateboard&Category=1&CreatorName=AlexAstral%20Studios&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale
